title: GRDM emergency responds to fires in Knysna
description: KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - A fire is currently...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - A fire is currently burning in the Khayalethu e Dameni informal settlement, Knysna. The cause of the blaze is unknown and it is not yet clear how many homes are affected.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - A fire is currently burning in the Khayalethu e Dameni informal settlement, Knysna. The cause of the blaze is unknown and it is not yet clear how many homes are affected."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Emergency services are reportedly on the scene, but it is unclear whether the fire has been contained.","html":"Emergency services are reportedly on the scene, but it is unclear whether the fire has been contained."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Meanwhile, the Garden Route District Municipality (GRDM) Wildfire Unit has issued a notice of an out-of-control wildfire in the proximity of Bongani and Concordia."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Knysna Municipality has requested assistance from the GRDM Fire and Rescue Service, and a GRDM firefighting crew is currently en route to Knysna.","html":"The Knysna Municipality has requested assistance from the GRDM Fire and Rescue Service, and a GRDM firefighting crew is currently en route to Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It remains uncertain whether the wildfire is related to the house fire in Khayalethu.","html":"It remains uncertain whether the wildfire is related to the house fire in Khayalethu."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Residents are urged to stay clear of affected areas and remain vigilant.","html":"Residents are urged to stay clear of affected areas and remain vigilant."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VIDEO: Supplied","html":"VIDEO: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre at 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp at 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Municipality has been approached for comment and more details are expected to follow.","html":"Knysna Municipality has been approached for comment and more details are expected to follow."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: GRDM emergency responds to fires in Knysna
